experiment: leukemia v3 — multi-source (C-NMC Delhi + Aria Tehran) for cross-lab generalization
aria_note: Aria is a v3 TRAINING source (near-perfect v3 Aria numbers are in-domain, not generalization). v2's Aria numbers (pre-training) show the single-source failure: Original AUC 0.404, Segmented 0.514.
